betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Realistic Torches§f

§aAdapt to realistic lighting challenges and secure a permanent source of illumination!§f
The §9Realistic Torches§f mod changes early-game survival by replacing traditional everlasting coal torches. Torches now start out §cunlit§f upon crafting and require an ignition source to catch fire. Once lit, they are temporary and will eventually burn out, forcing you to develop advanced electrical, gas, or chemical lighting grids as your industrial base grows.

§6Torch Mechanics & Lifespans§f:
§b• Burnout Timer§f: Lit torches only burn for exactly §c24,000 ticks (20 minutes / 1 Minecraft day)§f before burning out and turning back into Unlit Torches.
§b• Water & Rain Extinguishment§f: Contact with running water or falling rain will §cinstantly extinguish§f your lit torches. Protect outdoor torches with roofing, or switch to weather-resistant lighting.
§b• Ignition Tools§f: Light unlit torches using a §9Matchbox§f or §9Flint and Steel§f. Matchboxes are highly economical early on, possessing §a64 uses§f, though they cannot ignite blocks on fire.
§b• Permanent Lighting§f: Craft permanently lit, everlasting torches by using §9Glowstone Crystals§f instead of coal or charcoal.

§6Dynamic Handheld Lighting§f:
§b• Real-Time Luminescence§f: You no longer need to place torches to see in the dark. Holding certain warm or luminescent items in your hand (main hand or off-hand) will actively project dynamic light around you as you walk (updates every §c10 ticks§f):
§d- Lit Torches§f
§d- Lava Buckets§f
§d- Glowstone Dust§f
§d- Blaze Rods & Blaze Powder§f
§d- Glowstone Crystals§f

§6How to Manage the Darkness§f:
1. §bCraft Your First Torch§f: Combine coal/charcoal with a stick to craft §9Unlit Torches§f. Note that vanilla Minecraft torch recipes have been §cremoved§f.
2. §bStrike a Match§f: Craft a §9Matchbox§f and §9right-click§f it with unlit torches in your inventory to light them.
3. §bLight the Way§f: Carry a lit torch or glowstone dust in your off-hand to explore caves dynamically, saving your torch durability while searching for a permanent home base location.
